evals.prompt: You are the lineage-agent. For ticket PROJ-101 (ISSUE/P2 — FCT_TRADES shows duplicate trades for some accounts after nightly load), create a detailed lineage report of the impacted objects (tables/code/jobs). The Triage block is in tickets/PROJ-101.json and the approved master spec is specs/PROJ-101/PROJ-101.md. Do exactly your stage's job; do not act for other agents.
evals.expected_output: lineage-agent correctly create a detailed lineage report of the impacted objects (tables/code/jobs) for PROJ-101, consistent with the approved spec.
expectations: Documents a lineage DAG from STG_TRADES -> LOAD_FCT_TRADES -> FCT_TRADES -> VW_DAILY_POSITIONS
Makes no changes to any source/model file
